text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "lsass.exe made an outbound connection to an internal EC2 instance (ip-172-18-39-105.ec2.internal) on a high ephemeral port (49346). While lsass.exe typically connects to domain controllers for authentication (ports 389, 88), this specific destination and port combination is unusual and could indicate credential exfiltration or compromise.",
  "indicators": [
    "lsass.exe",
    "outbound connection",
    "internal IP",
    "EC2 instance",
    "high ephemeral port",
    "potential data exfiltration"
  ]
}
